spec.name: Hate
spec.description: There is little in life much easier, and truthfully, little that is a quicker ticket to damnation. You give brief thanks that you have come to the end of these trials, but your words are drowned out by something much louder, a mechanical preaching that drowns your ears in anger. You hear a steady, repetitive litany of the same phrase, over and over again: "I go the way history dictates with the blind assurance of a sleep-walker."
